3302190.name: Realm Rift: The Hunt Across Worlds
3302190.description:
Realm Rift: The Hunt Across Worlds is an action-packed adventure where you, an Interstellar Marine, must race against time and an AI-driven enemy.

Set aboard a space station, you must teleport across three distinct worlds, each filled with danger and mystery, to collect powerful Gems before the AI's deadly clones get their hands on them.

These Gems are the key to stopping the AI from creating Dyson spheres, which could mean the end of all life.

Battle through hostile environments, face relentless enemies, and outsmart the AI's perfected clones as you fight to save humanity in a race across worlds.
3302190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
